zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald De Ferrers於1265年出生在英國英格蘭戴文貝 費雷斯時，他的父親William IV De Ferrers40歲，母親Isolda de Cardinham36歲。他於1290年與Margaret le Dennis在英國戴文塔維斯托可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1305年在英國英格蘭戴文塔維斯托可享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald De Ferrers于1265年出生在英国英格兰戴文貝 費雷斯时，他的父亲William IV De Ferrers40岁，母亲Isolda de Cardinham36岁。他于1290年与Margaret le Dennis在英国戴文塔維斯托可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1305年在英国英格兰戴文塔維斯托可享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald De Ferrers was born in 1265, in Bere Ferrers, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, William IV De Ferrers, was 40 and his mother, Isolda de Cardinham, was 36. He married Margaret le Dennis in 1290, in Tavistock, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1305, in Tavistock, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald De Ferrers est né en 1265, à Bere Ferrers, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William IV De Ferrers, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Isolda de Cardinham, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margaret le Dennis en 1290, à Tavistock, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1305, à Tavistock, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald De Ferrers 1265 in Bere Ferrers, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William IV De Ferrers 40 und seine Mutter Isolda de Cardinham 36. Er hat 1290 in Tavistock, Devon, England Margaret le Dennis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1305 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Tavistock, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald De Ferrers è nato il nel 1265 nel Bere Ferrers, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William IV De Ferrers, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Isolda de Cardinham, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Margaret le Dennis nel 1290, nel Tavistock, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1305, nel Tavistock, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald De Ferrersが1265年にイギリスイギリスデボンバー フエレルズで生まれた時，父William IV De Ferrersは40歳，母Isolda de Cardinhamは36歳であった。1290年にイギリスデボンタヴィストックでMargaret le Dennisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1305年にイギリスイギリスデボンタヴィストックで40歳で死去した。

ko.Bere Ferrers with Bere Alston, Devon, En: 영국 데폰 버 페레르스 위스 버 알스턴

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald De Ferrers(이)가 1265년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 버 페레르스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William IV De Ferrers(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Isolda de Cardinham(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1290년 영국 데폰 타비스톡에서 Margaret le Dennis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 타비스톡에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Margaret le Dennis em 1290, em Tavistock, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald De Ferrers родился в 1265 г. в местности бир фиррирс, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William IV De Ferrers было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Isolda de Cardinham, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret le Dennis в 1290 г. в местности тавистокк, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1305 г. в местности тавистокк, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.
